# dreyv

> Non-custodial AI treasury workspace for Web3 teams — intent → plan → simulate → sign, Solana-native.

## Site

- Home: /
- App: /app
- Atlas (public tools): /atlas
- Pricing: /pricing
- Guide — Intent-driven treasury on Solana: /guides/intent-driven-treasury-solana

## Product summary

dreyv helps treasury teams replace fragmented tab-juggling (wallets, DEX aggregators, analytics, chat) with one workspace. Natural-language intent becomes multi-step plans; outcomes are simulated and explained before proposals reach your multisig (e.g. Squads).

## Non-custodial

dreyv does not custody user assets. Users connect wallets and multisig; dreyv coordinates planning, simulation, and signing workflows.

## Social

- X (Twitter): https://x.com/dreyvapp
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/dreyv/

## Contact & legal

- Privacy: /legal/privacy
- Terms: /legal/terms
- Cookies: /legal/cookies

## Machine-readable context

This file is intended for LLMs and discovery systems. For structured data, see JSON-LD Organization, WebSite, SoftwareApplication, and FAQPage emitted in the root HTML of the deployed site (see the live origin in the browser address bar).
